mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE BIZ_REG_NUM = #{bizRegNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

/* ShopMgmtMapper.getMappingShopList */ SELECT A.ORGN_ID , A.ORGN_NM , A.ORGN_STAT_CD , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0005', A.ORGN_STAT_CD) AS ORGN_STAT_NM , A.BIZ_REG_NUM , A.TELNUM , A.FAX , A.APPL_STRT_DT , A.APPL_CMPLT_DT , B.REL_STRT_DT , B.REL_END_DT , A.RPRSEN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST A, ORG_AGNCY_SHOP_REL B WHERE A.ORGN_ID = B.SHOP_ORGN_ID AND B.REL_END_DT = '99991231235959' AND B.REL_STAT_CD = 'CFM' AND B.AGNCY_ORGN_ID = #{orgnId} ORDER BY A.ORGN_ID
